subject: EntryState
truth: Stop using `raw_attributes` on EntryState; use `entry_raw_attributes` instead.
quote: EntryState: `entry_raw_attributes` is populated instead of `raw_attributes` (thanks Christian)

subject: pyasn1 decoder - raw_dn
old: raw_dn was returned as a pyasn1 object
truth: When using the pyasn1 decoder, `raw_dn` is now returned as bytes instead of a pyasn1 object.
quote: when using the pyasn1 decoder raw_dn is not returned as a pyasn1 object anymore but as bytes

from_fact: raw_dn was returned as a pyasn1 object

subject: utils.dn.parse_dn() - strip parameter
old: strip parameter defaulted to True (or different value)
truth: The `strip` parameter in `utils.dn.parse_dn()` now defaults to `False` instead of `True`.
quote: strip parameter defaults to False in utils.dn.parse_dn()

from_fact: strip parameter defaulted to true (or different value)

subject: modify()
old: modify() did not mutate the passed object
new: modify() now mutates the passed object
truth: The object passed to modify() is now mutated unexpectedly.
quote: change object passed to modify() was unexpectedly mutated (thanks John)

from_fact: modify() did not mutate the passed object
modify() now mutates the passed object

subject: ServerPool server state sharing
old: Servers in a pool had independent state per connection
new: Servers state is shared between connections using the same pool when single=True
truth: ServerPool with single=True shares server state across connections, which may cause unexpected cross-connection side effects.
quote: added single=True parameter to the ServerPool object definition. Servers state is shared between connections using the same pool

from_fact: servers in a pool had independent state per connection
servers state is shared between connections using the same pool when single=true

subject: ServerState in ServerPool
truth: ServerState changed from namedtuple to class, breaking code that relied on namedtuple behaviour (e.g. immutability, tuple unpacking).
quote: ServerState namedtuple converted to class in core/pooling (thanks Krisztian)

subject: connections in context manager with AUTO_BIND_NONE
old: connections in context manager would bind even with AUTO_BIND_NONE
new: connections in context manager no longer bind when auto_bind is set to AUTO_BIND_NONE
truth: Connections in context manager no longer bind when auto_bind is set to AUTO_BIND_NONE, so code relying on automatic binding will break.
quote: connections in context manager don't bind anymore when auto_bind is set to AUTO_BIND_NONE (Thanks Tim)

from_fact: connections in context manager would bind even with auto_bind_none
connections in context manager no longer bind when auto_bind is set to auto_bind_none

subject: missing entry attribute search behavior
old: accessing a missing entry's attribute raised an exception when searching
new: accessing a missing entry's attribute returns False when searching
truth: Accessing a missing entry's attribute now returns False instead of raising an exception.
quote: missing entry's attribute return False when searching instead of raising an exception (thanks Maxsond)

from_fact: accessing a missing entry's attribute raised an exception when searching
accessing a missing entry's attribute returns false when searching

subject: formatter exception behavior
old: formatters raised exceptions when unable to format
new: formatters return the raw_value when unable to format
truth: Formatters no longer raise exceptions but return the raw_value when unable to format.
quote: formatters never raise exceptions but return the raw_value when unable to format

from_fact: formatters raised exceptions when unable to format
formatters return the raw_value when unable to format

subject: async module
truth: Stop importing from 'async' module; import from 'asynchronous' module instead.
quote: async module renamed to asynchronous for compatibility with Python 3.7 (thank Barry)

subject: DEFAULT_ENCODING config parameter
truth: Stop using DEFAULT_ENCODING, use DEFAULT_CLIENT_ENCODING instead.
quote: DEFAULT_ENCODING config parameter renamed to DEFAULT_CLIENT_ENCODING

subject: ADDITIONAL_ENCODINGS config parameter
truth: Stop using ADDITIONAL_ENCODINGS, use ADDITIONAL_SERVER_ENCONDINGS instead.
quote: ADDITIONAL_ENCODINGS config parameter renamed to ADDITIONAL_SERVER_ENCONDINGS

subject: to_unicode() function
new: to_unicode() has from_server=False parameter, does not try client encoding when decoding server data
truth: to_unicode() now has a from_server=False parameter; when True, it skips client encoding while decoding data from the server.
quote: added from_server=False parameter to to_unicode() to not try client encoding while decoding data from server

from_fact: to_unicode() has from_server=false parameter, does not try client encoding when decoding server data

subject: RESPONSE_DN_ENCODING parameter
truth: Stop using RESPONSE_DN_ENCODING, use ADDITIONAL_ENCODINGS instead.
quote: RESPONSE_DN_ENCODING parameter renamed to ADDITIONAL_ENCODINGS

subject: empty schema properties
truth: Empty schema properties are now set to empty dict() instead of None, so code checking for None will break.
quote: empty schema properties are set to empty dict() instead of None

associative: check if schema property is empty

subject: integer validator
new: integer validator automatically converts valid string numbers to int
truth: Integer validator now automatically converts valid string numbers to int instead of rejecting them.
quote: integer validator now automatically convert valid string numbers to int

from_fact: integer validator automatically converts valid string numbers to int

subject: hashing algorithm
truth: Updated hashing algorithm from SHA to SHA1.
quote: updated hashing alghoritm SHA to SHA1

subject: to_bytes() and check_escape() functions
truth: Stop using to_bytes() and check_escape() from ldap3.utils.conv as they have been removed.
quote: removed to_bytes() and check_escape() from ldap3.utils.conv (ambiguous functions)

subject: config parameters access
old: Direct access to config parameters like CLASSES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK, ATTRIBUTES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK, UTF8_ENCODED_SYNTAXES, UTF8_ENCODED_TYPES
truth: Config parameters CLASSES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK, ATTRIBUTES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK, UTF8_ENCODED_SYNTAXES, UTF8_ENCODED_TYPES are no longer directly accessible; use get_config_parameter() or get_config_parameters() instead.
quote: CLASSES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK and ATTRIBUTES_EXCLUDED_FROM_CHECK moved to ldap3.utils.config and made available via get_config_parameter() - added UTF8_ENCODED_SYNTAXES in ldap3.config.utils and made available via get_config_parameter() - added UTF8_ENCODED_TYPES in ldap3.config.utils and made available via get_config_parameter() - config parameters made available only via get_config_parameters()

from_fact: direct access to config parameters like classes_excluded_from_check, attributes_excluded_from_check, utf8_encoded_syntaxes, utf8_encoded_types

subject: auto_escape parameter
truth: Automatic escaping of assertion values is now enabled by default; existing code that passed unescaped values may get double-escaped or behave differently.
quote: enable automatic escaping of assertion values

subject: sanitization of DN in bind operation
old: DN sanitization was performed during bind
truth: Sanitization of DN in bind operation was removed; servers that accepted non-standard DNs for Simple Bind will now receive them unsanitized.
quote: removed sanitization of DN in bind operation because some servers accept non standard DN for Simple Bind

from_fact: dn sanitization was performed during bind

subject: ldap3.abstract.Reader
truth: Stop using the old signature of ldap3.abstract.Reader; use the new signature instead.
quote: changed signature of ldap3.abstract.Reader object

subject: Reader cursor methods
truth: Stop calling search_size_limit(), search_time_limit(), and search_types_only on the Reader cursor; they have been removed.
quote: removed search_size_limit(), search_time_limit() and search_types_only in the Reader cursor

subject: LDAPTypeError exception
truth: Stop using LDAPTypeError; use LDAPAttributeError instead.
quote: renamed exception LDAPTypeError to LDAPAttributeError

subject: LDAPReaderError exception
truth: Stop using LDAPReaderError; use LDAPCursorError instead.
quote: LDAPReaderError exception renamed to LDAPCursorError

subject: LDAPControlsError exception
truth: Stop using LDAPControlsError; use LDAPControlError instead.
quote: LDAPControlsError exception renamed to LDAPControlError

subject: LDAPChangesError exception
truth: Stop using LDAPChangesError; use LDAPChangeError instead.
quote: LDAPChangesError exception renamed to LDAPChangeError

subject: compatibility constants
truth: Stop using compatibility constants; they have been removed from the ldap3 namespace.
quote: compatibility constants removed

subject: exceptions from ldap3 namespace
truth: Stop importing exceptions from the ldap3 namespace; import them from ldap3.core.exceptions instead.
quote: exceptions removed from ldap3 namespace, defined in ldap3.core.exceptions only

subject: RESULT_CODES location
truth: Stop accessing RESULT_CODES from ldap3; use ldap3.core.results.RESULT_CODES instead.
quote: RESULT_CODES moved to ldap3.core.results

subject: connection.extend.novell.remove_members_from_groups() parameter
truth: Stop using 'check' parameter in connection.extend.novell.remove_members_from_groups(); use 'fix' instead.
quote: Change paameter name from 'check' to 'fix' in connection.extend.novell.add_members_to_groups() and connection.extend.novell.remove_members_from_groups

subject: unauthenticated authentication
truth: Unauthenticated authentication is now disabled per RFC 4513 section 5.1.2; binds without credentials will fail.
quote: Disabled unauthenticated authentication, see RFC 4513 section 5.1.2 (thanks Petros)

subject: compat package
truth: The compat package has been removed and is no longer available for import.
quote: Removed the compat package

subject: SessionTerminatedByServer exception
truth: The exception SessionTerminatedByServer has been renamed to SessionTerminatedByServerError.
quote: Exception SessionTerminatedByServer renamed to SessionTerminatedByServerError and added to ldap3 namespace

subject: ALL_ATTRIBUTES search behaviour
old: ALL_ATTRIBUTES sent '*' in the attribute list while searching
new: ALL_ATTRIBUTES does not send any attribute in the attribute list while searching
truth: ALL_ATTRIBUTES no longer sends '*' as the attribute list during search; it sends an empty attribute list instead.
quote: ALL_ATTRIBUTES don't send any attribute in the attribute list (was sending '*') while searching

from_fact: all_attributes sent '*' in the attribute list while searching
all_attributes does not send any attribute in the attribute list while searching

subject: Connection.entries default
old: Connection.entries defaulted to None or similar
truth: Connection.entries now defaults to an empty list instead of a falsy value like None.
quote: Connection.entries defaults to empty list

from_fact: connection.entries defaulted to none or similar

subject: default server mode
truth: Default server mode changed from IP_SYSTEM_DEFAULT to IP_V6_PREFERRED, which may cause IPv6 connection attempts before IPv4.
quote: Changed default server mode from IP_SYSTEM_DEFAULT to IP_V6_PREFERRED

associative: why is my connection trying ipv6

subject: Abstract Attribute default values
old: allowed falsy values or None as default
new: does not permit falsy values or None as default
truth: Abstract Attribute no longer permits falsy values or None as default, which will raise errors if you previously passed such defaults.
quote: Abstract Attribute doesn't permit "falsy" values or None as default (thanks Lucas)

from_fact: allowed falsy values or none as default
does not permit falsy values or none as default

subject: exception response
old: response included in exception when raise_exceptions=True
truth: Stop relying on the response attribute of exceptions raised with raise_exceptions=True; it has been removed to avoid long exception messages.
quote: Removed response from exception raised with raise_exceptions=True to avoid very long exceptions message

from_fact: response included in exception when raise_exceptions=true

subject: SESSION_TERMINATED_BY_SERVER constant
truth: The SESSION_TERMINATED_BY_SERVER constant value changed from 0 to -2; any code comparing against 0 will break.
quote: Changed SESSION_TERMINATED_BY_SERVER from 0 to -2

subject: FORMAT_xxx variables
truth: Stop using FORMAT_xxx variables in the ldap3 namespace; they have been removed.
quote: Removed unneeded FORMAT_xxx variables in ldap3 namespace

subject: constant values type
truth: All constant values in ldap3 are now strings instead of their previous types; any code comparing constants with non-string types will break.
quote: Constant values in ldap3 are now strings. This is helpful in testing and debugging

subject: parameter name in to_dn()
truth: Stop using separe_rdn parameter in to_dn(); use separate_rdn instead.
quote: change parameter name from separe_rdn to separate_rdn in ldap3.utils.conv.to_dn()

subject: convert_to_ldif() function
truth: Stop using convert_to_ldif(); it has been renamed to _convert_to_ldif() (now private/internal).
quote: renamed convert_to_ldif() to _convert_to_ldif()

subject: real_server machinery
truth: Stop using real_server machinery; messageId is now global and monotonic for the whole library.
quote: real_server machinery removed - messageId is now global and monotonic for the whole library

subject: checked_attributes
truth: Stop using checked_attributes; attributes are now returned formatted directly when schema is read and check_names=True.
quote: attributes are returned formatted if schema is read and check_names = True, removed checked_attributes

subject: connection.close() method
truth: Stop using connection.close(); use connection.unbind() instead.
quote: remove the connection.close() method - use connection.unbind()

subject: check_names parameter default
truth: check_names parameter in Connection now defaults to True, so attribute and class names will be validated against schema by default.
quote: check_names parameter in connection now defaults to True (so when schema info is available attribute and class name will be checked when performing LDAP operations)

subject: TLSv1 default for Tls connection
truth: TLSv1 is no longer the default protocol for Tls connections; you must explicitly specify a protocol.
quote: removed TLSv1 as default for Tls connection

subject: multiple extended responses to single extended request
truth: Receiving multiple extended responses to a single extended request now raises an exception (per RFC 4511).
quote: exception is now raised if you receive multiple extended response to a single extended request. This is not allowed by RFC 4511

subject: server.schema.attribute_type keys
truth: Stop accessing server.schema.attribute_type by OID; use attribute name as the key instead.
quote: Now the key in server.schema.attribute_type is the attribute name (was the oid)

subject: server.schema.object_classes keys
truth: Stop accessing server.schema.object_classes by OID; use class name as the key instead.
quote: Now the key in server.schema.object_classes is the class name (was the oid)

subject: get_response() return value
truth: Stop calling get_response() and expecting a single value; it now returns a tuple (response, result).
quote: changed return value in get_response from response to (response, result) - helpful for multi-threaded connections

subject: result and response attributes
new: operation result is only in result attribute
truth: Stop reading operation results from the response attribute; use the result attribute instead.
quote: result and response attributes don't overlap anymore. Operation result is only in result attribute.

from_fact: operation result is only in result attribute

subject: ServerPool signature
truth: ServerPool constructor now requires or accepts active and exhaust parameters; update instantiation accordingly.
quote: changed ServerPool signature to accept active and exhaust parameters

subject: start_listen parameter
truth: Stop passing start_listen parameter; it has been removed.
quote: removed unneeded start_listen parameter

subject: ldap3.abstraction module
truth: Stop importing from ldap3.abstraction; import from ldap3.abstract instead.
quote: renamed ldap3.abstraction to ldap3.abstract

subject: connection.py, server.py, tls.py file locations
truth: Stop importing connection, server, or tls from the ldap3 root package; import from ldap3.core instead.
quote: moved connection.py, server.py and tls.py files to ldap3.core

subject: forceBind parameter
truth: Stop using the forceBind parameter; it has been removed.
quote: removed useless forceBind parameter

subject: exception base class
new: exceptions inherit from LDAPException (subclass of Exception)
truth: Catch LDAPException instead of catching generic Exception or other LDAP exception types; all library exceptions now inherit from LDAPException.
quote: Changed exceptions returned by the library to LDAPException, a subclass of Exception.

from_fact: exceptions inherit from ldapexception (subclass of exception)

subject: search response attributes
truth: Search response attributes changed from tuple to dict, so code accessing them by index will break.
quote: Changed attributes returned in search from tuple to dict

subject: authentication parameters
truth: Authentication parameters moved from Server object to Connection object; code setting auth params on Server will silently be ignored.
quote: Moved authentication parameters from Server object to Connection object

subject: old constant names in ldap3 namespace
old: AUTH_ANONYMOUS, AUTH_SIMPLE, AUTH_SASL, SEARCH_SCOPE_BASE_OBJECT, SEARCH_SCOPE_SINGLE_LEVEL, SEARCH_SCOPE_WHOLE_SUBTREE, SEARCH_NEVER_DEREFERENCE_ALIASES, SEARCH_DEREFERENCE_IN_SEARCHING, SEARCH_DEREFERENCE_FINDING_BASE_OBJECT, SEARCH_DEREFERENCE_ALWAYS, STRATEGY_SYNC, STRATEGY_ASYNC_THREADED, STRATEGY_LDIF_PRODUCER, STRATEGY_SYNC_RESTARTABLE, STRATEGY_REUSABLE_THREADED, STRATEGY_MOCK_SYNC, STRATEGY_MOCK_ASYNC, POOLING_STRATEGY_FIRST, POOLING_STRATEGY_ROUND_ROBIN, POOLING_STRATEGY_RANDOM, GET_NO_INFO, GET_DSA_INFO, GET_SCHEMA_INFO, GET_ALL_INFO
new: ANONYMOUS, SIMPLE, SASL, BASE, LEVEL, SUBTREE, DEREF_NEVER, DEREF_SEARCH, DEREF_BASE, DEREF_ALWAYS, SYNC, ASYNC, LDIF, RESTARTABLE, REUSABLE, MOCK_SYNC, MOCK_ASYNC, FIRST, ROUND_ROBIN, RANDOM, NONE, DSA, SCHEMA, ALL
truth: Stop using the old constant names (e.g. AUTH_ANONYMOUS, SEARCH_SCOPE_BASE_OBJECT, STRATEGY_SYNC); use the new shorter names (e.g. ANONYMOUS, BASE, SYNC) instead.
quote: The following older constants in ldap3 have been removed, please use the suggested ones: AUTH_ANONYMOUS = ANONYMOUS ...

from_fact: auth_anonymous, auth_simple, auth_sasl, search_scope_base_object, search_scope_single_level, search_scope_whole_subtree, search_never_dereference_aliases, search_dereference_in_searching, search_dereference_finding_base_object, search_dereference_always, strategy_sync, strategy_async_threaded, strategy_ldif_producer, strategy_sync_restartable, strategy_reusable_threaded, strategy_mock_sync, strategy_mock_async, pooling_strategy_first, pooling_strategy_round_robin, pooling_strategy_random, get_no_info, get_dsa_info, get_schema_info, get_all_info

anonymous, simple, sasl, base, level, subtree, deref_never, deref_search, deref_base, deref_always, sync, async, ldif, restartable, reusable, mock_sync, mock_async, first, round_robin, random, none, dsa, schema, all
